raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. Un darrija/tastam KUN-
GAM ne patikke/ tattchu ne ta
ka tee zitti Israëta Kehnini/ kas
preekſch winna bijuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Prett to zehlehs Salina-
naffers tas kehninsch no Affiri-
jas / un Oſeüs tappe tam par
Kalpu/ ka winſch tam Dahwa-
nas dewe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Bet tas Kehninsch no Affi-
rijas fajutte/ ka Oſeüs bij weenu
Derribu darrijs / un Wehſtne-
fchus us to Egiptes Kehnizu So-
usu fuhtijs/ un tahs Dahwanas
tam Kehnizam no Affirijas ik
Gaddus ne noneffe/ un tas Keh-
ninsch no Affirijas apmette prett
winnu Lehgert / un mette win-
nu Zeetuma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Jo tas Kehninsch no Affi-
rijaszehlehsus augſchu zaure wiſ-
ſu Semmi / un nahze uhs Sa-
mariju/ un apmette Lehgeri pret-
ti to trihs Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un dewitá Gaddá Oſeüs/
usnehme tas Kehninsch no Affi-
rijas Samariju / un atswedde
Israëlu uhs Affiriju / un likke
tohs diſhwoht eekſch Alas un Abo-
ra / pee tahs Uppes Gosan/ un
to Meederu Pilsfahtôs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Jo kad tee Israëta Behr-
ni prett to KUNGll fauw Dec-
wu apgrehkojahs / kas tohs no
Egiptes Semmes bij isweddis /
no ta Egiptes Kehniza Waraus fas
Rohkas/ un bij zittus Deewus
bihjajuschees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un bij eekſch Pagann Lik-
kumeim statgaifſchi / to tas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Un tee Israëta Behrni
ſteppinaja jawas Leetas/ kas ne-
bija labbas pretti to KUNGU
fawu Deewu/ un bij few Aug-
stumus ustafſiſtchi wiſſoſtawôs
Pilsfahtôs/ tik labbi Pillis/ ka-
ſtiprôs Pilsfahtôs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Un tee bij few uszeltas
Bildes un Elka Meschus patai-
ſiſchi us wiſſeem augſteem Pa-
kalneem / un appakſch wiſſeem
falkeem Kohkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Un bij tur kivehpinaſſchi
us wiſſeem Angstumeem / ta-
patt ka tee Pagani / ko tas
KUNGS winnu Preekſcha bij
aisweddis/ un bij taunas Leetas
padarriſſchi/ to KUNGU apkai-
tinadaini.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Un tee bij teem Elka-Dee-
weem kalpojtchi / no ka tas
KUNGS us teem bij tazzijs :
Jums to Leetu ne buhs darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Un kad tas KUNGS
prett Israëlu / un prett Juhdu
zaure wiſſeem Praweeſcheem / un
wiſſeem Redſetajeem Leezibu de-
we/ un likke fazziht: Atgreeſee-
tees no juhſeem nikneem Zelſeem/
un turrajt mannuß Banslus /
un mannuß Eikumus/ pehz wiſ-
sa Baufſibas / ko es juhteem
Tehweem parwehlejs / un ko es
zaure manneem Kalpeem teem
Praweeſcheem pee juims efmu
juhtijs.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
